subject: Mozi Minute: Show Rate Hack
body:
Words I like: More potential is wasted through inaction than incompetence.

Here's a simple hack to increase show rates:

When a prospect self-schedules (books their own call), call them right then and offer to slide them up to a sooner time.

I call this the "Pull Forward Technique."

Benefits:

1. Same-day show rates are higher than booked-future show rates
2. Fewer blank spaces in your calendar
3. Close hot leads immediately
4. Opens up future slots for new calls
5. Disqualify faster on bad fits
6. Creates momentum for your sales team

It's a small thing that changes the entire game.
